channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Fire captain, wife, and three sons die in Utah flash flood
item.description: The victims were a Provo fire captain, his wife, and their three sons, according to fire officials.

item.title: Two US service members killed, one missing after Iranian strike in Jordan
item.description: US forces conducted airstrikes against Iran on Saturday evening under President Trump's orders after two US service members were killed.

item.title: Iran live updates: Kuwait and Bahrain report Iranian attacks after US strikes
item.description: President Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on February 28, involving joint US-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Severely ill prisoners granted early release remain stuck behind bars
item.description: Prisoners with severe medical conditions may receive compassionate release, but without a long-term care facility, many remain incarcerated.
